title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a small core providing read, write, edit, and bash operations, extensible through npm or git packages. It supports multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering an alternative to frontier models with harsh rate limits.
